name: seo-outreach-skill
description: Turn backlink and outreach opportunities into contact research, article analysis, personalized outreach drafts, and follow-up plans for manual sending.

draft_handoff.note: This public skill focuses on research and draft generation. Delivery should be handled by a separately approved sender workflow.

metadata.minimum_permissions: read-only tracker access and optional search research only
metadata.data_access_policy: Draft generation is the default and intended public mode. Private spreadsheet access is opt-in only. Delivery should be handled by a separately approved sender workflow.
